summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kotzinons Studio website. All 11 backend API endpoints and 11 frontend user stories tested successfully. 100% pass rate across backend and frontend.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/characters returns 5 characters with all required fields
Backend: GET /api/characters/{slug} returns single character (tested with 'goldon')
Backend: GET /api/characters/invalid-slug returns 404
Backend: GET /api/team returns 4 team members (Uri Eini, Daniel Olaleye, Tolu Olaleye, Joy Eini Olaleye)
Backend: GET /api/gallery returns 7 gallery items
Backend: GET /api/gallery?category=digital-renders filters correctly (4 items)
Backend: GET /api/videos returns video with youtube_id='diZbJpeyo6o'
Backend: POST /api/contact creates contact message successfully
Backend: POST /api/newsletter creates newsletter subscription
Backend: POST /api/newsletter (duplicate email) - idempotency works correctly
Backend: GET /api/stats returns correct counts {characters: 5, team: 4, gallery: 7, videos: 1}
Frontend: Homepage hero section displays multicolor 'KOTZINONS' title, hero image, and CTA buttons
Frontend: Characters page displays 5 character cards with working color filters (Red: 2, Blue: 1, Gold: 1, Green: 1)
Frontend: Character dossier modal opens with full details (name, role, tagline, weapon, abilities badges)
Frontend: Animations page displays embedded YouTube video (ID: diZbJpeyo6o)
Frontend: Team page displays 4 team member cards with correct names and roles
Frontend: About page displays story content with journey timeline
Frontend: Gallery page displays 7 items with masonry grid, category tabs (All, Digital Renders, Concept Art, Toy Photos, Posters), and lightbox dialog
Frontend: Contact form submission works (name, email, inquiry_type, subject, message) with success toast
Frontend: Newsletter signup form works with success confirmation
Frontend: Mobile navigation (390x844 viewport) - hamburger menu opens with all 7 nav links
Frontend: 404 page displays 'PAGE NOT FOUND' with 'Take me home' button that navigates to homepage
